---
name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible problem
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug

---

## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what is happening.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Tap on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour
What actually happens.

## Environment
- **App version:** (e.g. 0.9.0)
- **Android version:** (e.g. Android 14)
- **Device:** (e.g. Pixel 7)

## Logs / screenshots
If applicable, paste a logcat excerpt or attach a screenshot.
